title: マイルCSの後に・大団円

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: That was awesome!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Haha... You're a tough one, Akebono... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Your presence here today really fired me
up and made me want to do my best!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's been foreeever since I ran so hard. It feels like
my body's gonna fall apart!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha! It's the same for me! Thanks for the great
match!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff! M-me too! I felt all like, "Raaah!" and stuff!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in the audience is smiling. I felt just like
Carrot Ranger!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Siiigh.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Whew, I can't move a muscle!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. That looks nice. Maybe I'll lie down for a
bit too. Oof!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You all right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Applause and cheers from the stands pour over
them nonstop as the three of them chat.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniffle! That was such a passionate race!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Right? They were all trying so hard, I couldn't
look away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship, which the runners all
wove together with Fuji Kiseki at the lead...

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... damn! That was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Set everyone's hearts aflame!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! Your cheers were what made
it possible for us to run our best!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And so, the curtain closes on our classic year.
Next up is our long-awaited senior year, filled
only with heavy hitters!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Even bigger and better miracles await you there,
so farewell until then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki bows politely toward the stands, snaps
her fingers, and...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Where's the smoke coming from?!
Where's Fuji Kiseki?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, she makes her graceful exit.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just wondering, but how do you feel about taking
on the Takamatsunomiya Kinen next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after we return from Kyoto, Fuji Kiseki
stops by my office and opens a conversation with
that sudden question.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takamatsunomiya Kinen is a 1,200-meter G1
turf sprint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little suspicious of the straightforward
suggestion since she's usually such a prankster.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Could we go over the details at a later
time? I'd like to gather my thoughts some more
first!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Right now, all I know is that I want to put on an
even bigger show in my senior year than I did as a
classic racer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You must've seen all the articles people have
written about my trajectory during my classic
year, right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"It's been a year of victories for this entertainer,
leaving many moved by her shows."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Although her agenda has yet to be revealed,
expectations are high."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Everyone is looking forward to what the future
holds." Hehe! It's kind of embarrassing to be
lauded like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, almost every article out there
is filled with profuse praise for her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was able to send off my classic year with a grand
finale, and it went even better than I planned, to
be honest!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure everyone's looking forward to an even
bigger miracle from me, and I can't disappoint
them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The praise extolling Fuji Kiseki shows no signs of
slowing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If anything, her charismatic speech, miraculous
exit from the venue, and theatrical announcement
boosted her popularity exponentially.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Countless articles and video clips about her are
uploaded every day.
